calendar.matters:
Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Oct-14-2014 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appearance by any party or counsel.

The Court stated that Mr. Ambrunn's petition was continued from September 9, 2014 to this date for Mr. Ambrunn to file a Declaration in Response to the Examiner's Notes. No declaration was filed. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: Peter Busch. Clerk: Sandy Hilton.

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Sep-09-2014 Continued To Oct-14-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Ambrunn for and with Robert Stine and Ray Rudolph.

The Court stated that it is inclined to take the matter off calendar, that the matter has been on calendar twelve times, that there is no notice and that the Probate Examiner's notes have never been addressed. Mr. Ambrunn stated that the Examiner's notes were addressed and that the proof of service was filed and presented to the Examiner last Wednesday. Mr. Ambrunn also stated that they settled with one of the Parties (Mr. Carrucci), that he does not believe Randy's relatives are entitled to notice, and that Randy waived his rights/never came forward. In addition, Mr. Ambrunn also spoke of Mr. Toney's and Margaret's time of death, stated that they do not have letters for Sylvia Wolaver's Estate in Florida or letters for Margaret Huerta's Estate in Washington, that they are asking the Court for an order establishing that the first amendment is valid and the operating document, and that the "thought document" is not valid. Furthermore, Mr. Ambrunn stated that they settled with Bobbi Hagen as a debt of the Estate and that it their position that she is not a Beneficiary. The Court questioned whether Ms. Hagan's settlement affects the other Heirs shares. The Petition for Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries, etc. was continued to October 14, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for filing of declaration in response to the Probate Examiner's notes.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Aug-26-2014 Continued To Sep-09-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Jul-15-2014 Continued To Aug-26-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Jun-24-2014 Continued To Jul-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Ambrunn for Petitioners. Joseph Ferrucci for Bobbi Hagen.

Mr. Ambrunn stated that he believes he addressed all of the Probate Examiner's notes, that yesterday he filed a proof of service and a declaration addressing questions about Ms. Wolaver, and that the objections were withdrawn as part of the settlement negotiations. Mr. Ferrucci stated that the settlement was not approved by the Court, that the settlement was entered into on April 14, 2014 and that they filed the written agreement on April 16, 2014. The Petition for Instructions, etc. was continued to July 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-15-2014 Continued To Apr-29-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Continued To Apr-15-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Ambrunn for Robert Stein. Joe Ferrucci for Bobby Sue Hagan.

Mr. Ambrunn stated that they reached settlement and requested one week to finalize it. Mr. Ferrucci stated that they are very close and that he anticipates their objection will be withdrawn. The Petition for Instructions was continued to April 15, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed Counsel that all procedural problems will have to be cleaned up before the Court can rule on the petition.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Apr-01-2014 Off Calendar

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Bill Ambrunn and Ray Rudolph for Robert Stine. Joe Ferrucci for Bobby Hagen.

Counsel stated that a settlement had been reached and requested a two week continuance. The matter was continued to April 1, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Mar-18-2014 Continued To Apr-01-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Feb-25-2014 Continued To Mar-18-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: William Ambrunn for and with Robert Stine and Ray Rudolph (Co-Trustees). Joesph Ferrucci for and with Bobbi Hagen (Objector).

Mr. Ambrunn stated that he has a response to the Probate Examiner's notes and a Proof of Service, and that he served Leo, Dolores and the Attorney General. The Court directed the Parties to step out of the courtroom and talk. Upon returning, the Parties agreed to a three week continuance to work on settlement. The Petition for Instructions, etc. and the Order to Appear were continued to February 25, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Allen. (Not Reported)

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jan-21-2014 Continued To Feb-25-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition For Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries And Validity Of Purported Amendment Trust.
Off Calendar Dec-17-2013 Continued To Jan-21-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Joseph Ferrucci for and with Bobbi Hagen (Objector).

The Court noted that this petition was filed by Mr. Ambrunn (Attorney), that the matter has been continued several times, that Mr. Ambrunn has not responded to the Probate Examiner's notes and that it has not heard from him. Mr. Ferrucci stated that the last time he heard from Mr. Ambrunn was the Monday before Thanksgiving and that he has not heard from him again. An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney William Ambrunn to appear on January 21, 2014 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to dismiss the Petition for Instructions or move forward. The Petition for Instructions Ascertaining Beneficiaries and Validity of Purported Amendment Trust was also continued to that date.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton. (Not Reported)
